menu.title: Stellar Perimeter
levelSelect.title: Select Level
settings.title: Game Settings
game.placeFirstTower: Build your first tower to start
game.exitSaveHint: Unsaved progress in current level. Save before exiting?
tower.mg.name: Machine Gun
tower.mg.desc: Fast fire rate, great against swarms.
tower.missile.name: Missile
tower.missile.desc: High AoE damage with long range.
tower.laser.name: Laser
tower.slow.name: Slow
tower.poison.name: Poison
tower.poison.desc: Fan spray poison cloud, deals damage over time. Stacks.
tower.command.name: Command Tower
tower.command.desc: Grants bonus gold for kills of tier-2+ enemies in range. Upgraded: boosts nearby tower damage.
tower.tesla.name: Tesla Tower
tower.tesla.desc: Fires chain lightning devastating clustered enemies. Upgrades increase chain count and reduce damage decay.
tower.piercer.name: Piercer
tower.piercer.desc: Ultra high single-target damage that breaks armor. Slow fire rate but devastating burst. Ideal for elite targets.
enemy.level4.name: Armored Swarm
enemy.level4.desc: Crystalline armor blocks all but missile damage.
enemy.level5.name: Brood Mother
enemy.level5.desc: Massive carrier with multiple orbs. Extremely dangerous.
tutorial.welcome.ui:
Welcome to Outpost KX-7 Defense System
Please familiarize yourself with the interface
tutorial.hud.status: This shows your funds, base energy orbs, and current wave
tutorial.hud.time: This shows the elapsed game time
tutorial.hud.speed:
This shows the current game speed
Press 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 to set speed to 0.2x, 0.5x, 1x, 2x, 5x
tutorial.hud.rightPanel: The right sidebar is the build panel, where you select and build towers
tutorial.hud.buildButtons: Click buttons to choose tower types, each with different attack characteristics
tutorial.hud.minimap: The minimap shows the entire battlefield and enemy routes
tutorial.hud.viewport:
This is the main battlefield viewport
Drag with mouse or use arrow keys to pan, scroll wheel to zoom
Settings also allow mouse-follow zoom
tutorial.mission.objective:
Your mission is to protect the base Stellar Core Orbs
The Void Swarm has no fixed form, but Resonance Locators have marked their paths
Destroy them before they reach the base, deploy your defenses now
tutorial.hud.nextwave: When ready, the next wave countdown will appear here
tutorial.hud.rangeButton:
Click here to show/hide all tower attack ranges
(Press F key to toggle all tower ranges)
tutorial.reward.kill: Eliminating the Swarm grants extra money rewards
tutorial.hud.towerMenu: Right-click on a built tower to open its menu for [Sell] or [Upgrade]
tutorial.world.spawn: The Swarm emerges from spatial rifts and advances toward the base
tutorial.world.base: The Stellar Core Orbs are here; the Swarm will try to seize them
tutorial.world.exit: The Swarm carrying orbs will flee into the rift; don't let them escape
tutorial.menu.start: Click 'Start Game' to enter level selection
tutorial.level.select: Click Level 1 to begin your defense journey
tutorial.briefing.start: After reading the briefing, click 'Start Mission' to enter the battlefield
tutorial.build.mg: Click here to select the Machine Gun tower
tutorial.place.tower: Click an empty spot on the map to place a tower
tutorial.start.wave: When ready, click here to start the wave
level.11.name: KX-7: First Contact
level.11.subtitle: Deploy your first tower against the Void Swarm
level.12.name: Winding Defense
level.12.subtitle: Master upgrades and path coverage
level.13.name: Crossfire
level.13.subtitle: Combine MG and Missile towers
level.14.name: Mixed Assault
level.14.subtitle: Multiple rhythms per wave
level.15.name: Rift's Edge
level.15.subtitle: Hold the corridor against an endless tide
level.16.name: Twin Rifts
level.16.subtitle: Hold against Swarm pincer attacks from two routes
level.17.name: The Convergence
level.17.subtitle: Hold the final line where two routes merge
level.18.name: Starship Graveyard
level.18.subtitle: Defend among the wreckage of a shattered starship
level.19.name: Parallel Tracks
level.19.subtitle: Hold two parallel routes simultaneously
level.test.name: Test Maze
level.test.subtitle: Custom test map
level.110.name: Final Defense
level.110.subtitle: Hold the last hope on endless platforms
